name: Fred And Rose West: The Search For The Victims
original_name: Fred And Rose West: The Search For The Victims
overview: How Fred and Rosemary West became Britain's most notorious killer couple, the story of their victims and raising the question of how many more lives may have been lost.

trailers.title: She Went Hitchhiking & Never Came Back  | Fred and Rose West: The Search For The Victims | Channel 5
